variants: Arvid Thoren is a noted expert in the field of Actuarial Science. He authored a significant work entitled Signal Anchor Theory, which explores innovative concepts in risk assessment. His academic journey was guided by the mentorship of Matteo Vismara, who provided invaluable insights and support. In addition to his professional pursuits, Arvid is an active member of the Raindrop Choralists, where he shares his love for music with fellow enthusiasts. His research endeavors have been largely supported by the Hazelkin Resource Fund, enabling him to push the boundaries of his field.
